name: Apple-Sour Cream Streusel Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt cake pan.
3. Prepare the Streusel Filling by mixing all ingredients until crumbly.
4. Mix remaining ingredients except apples in a large bowl; beat vigorously for 1 minute.
5. Spread about 1/3 of the batter in the pan and sprinkle with half of the Streusel Filling and half of the apples.
6. Repeat with remaining batter, streusel filling, and apples.
7. Bake until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean (45-50 minutes).
8. Cool for 10 minutes in the pan.
9. Invert onto a heatproof serving plate and remove from pan.
10. Sprinkle cake with powdered sugar.
11. For glaze: Heat margarine or butter in a saucepan until melted. Stir in powdered sugar, vanilla extract, and milk (1 to 2 tablespoons at a time) until smooth and of desired consistency.
